owner_source: BBB Business Profile and Florida Sunbiz entity detail
source_query: Jacksonville FL roofing public business listing
source_evidence: Collector found public phone, website, and first-party email for Roof Life Jax. The official website describes roof cleaning, house washing, driveways, patios, gutter cleaning, screen enclosures, Jacksonville service coverage, and service since 1992. BBB confirms Roof Life in Jacksonville, lists the website and phone, identifies Michael Fortunato as President/principal/customer contact, lists alternate names including Roof Life Home Care Service and Cleaning Services of North Florida, Inc., and shows City of Jacksonville license 254913. Florida Sunbiz for ROOF LIFE JAX, LLC lists Michael A. Fortunato as registered agent and authorized member, Ayoub Rimili as VP, the PO Box mailing address, and inactive/admin-dissolved status as of 2017, so outreach should treat registration status as a risk note instead of assuming current LLC status.
visible_gap: Website is live and phone/email are visible, but no obvious modern estimate/contact form was detected; entity registration evidence is inactive, so verify current operating status before outreach.
offer_angle: Roof and exterior cleaning contact-path cleanup with registration-status verification
